identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.description: A high-density, dark-mode-first interface for security professionals. Prioritizes data scanning speed, monospace typography, and high-contrast status indicators over decorative elements. No soft shadows, no rounded corners larger than 4px.
identity.mission: Create a tool that feels like a powerful CLI with a GUI layer. Fast, responsive, and dense.

usage.body: Inter (for long descriptions) or JetBrains Mono (for data/code)

structure.table: Sticky Header, Fixed Height Rows, Horizontal Scroll for extra columns

buttons.style: Sharp edges or rounded-sm (2px). No pill shapes.

variants.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 border border-primary/20 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.2)]

inputs.style: bg-background border-border focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm font-mono text-sm h-8

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm border px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 font-mono uppercase tracking-wide

table.header: border-b h-10 px-2 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle scanline overlay (pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-[0.03])

types.modal: scale-95 to scale-100, opacity-0 to opacity-100

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #FAFAFA on dark backgrounds (APCA/WCAG AAA)

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px, depending on size. Sharp endpoints if possible.

universal_guidelines.grid_alignment: Align all containers to a 4px baseline grid.
universal_guidelines.density: Compact. Avoid excessive whitespace in data tables.
universal_guidelines.feedback: Show toast notifications for all actions (success/error).
universal_guidelines.error_handling: Inline validation for forms. Global error boundary for crashes.
universal_guidelines.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST have a unique data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind for 'JetBrains Mono' font family (add to theme.extend.fontFamily).
3. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar/Header structure.
4. Implement the 'DataTable' component using TanStack Table (or similar manual implementation) for virtualization if row count is high (>100).
5. Use 'recharts' for the Analytics Panel (LineChart, BarChart).
6. Ensure the 'Production' vs 'Eval' mode toggle is prominent in the header.
7. Implement the 'JobDetails' drawer/sheet as an overlay or expandable row.
9. STRICTLY follow the dark mode color palette defined above.
10. Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
